target: 25. Bye-Bye
July 24th
That… was…
C… this is!!
Ei, e… ei… ye…
This is the living world.
But, 300 years ago…
Three hundred…!?

Hiruko connected the exit of Tokoyo to this beach…
We're here now as data, separated from our bodies…

(When the loop happened, I saw the past.
Is this same state as before…)
That girl!!
<color=#GF_TIPS_023>me</color>, the human…

So that's it!!
Mio! Hurry and erase Hiruko!!!
That whale is the past version of Hiruko!

Hiruko's thing…
Transferring data to her past self,
Trying to redo everything from scratch!!

Wait! 
Don't get close to the whale! You'll be killed!
Wha…??
Don't get close to the deity. Get someone adult.
h…
GAAAH!! Scary!!! Ghosts!!!
Ah… I probably scared her.
Wow… touched the past!

Is it because of that awakened eye's power?
History might change…
E… ye.
So that's it… I understand.

Shinpei!
Take care of this kid, please!!

Eh…!?
Mio!? What are you planning to do?!

As long as Hiruko flows here…
Even if I erase this kid, it'll just repeat again.
The one that needs to be erased is the past Hiruko.

Hiruko isn't trying to redo it… 
She wants it to end, right?
You called me here because you wanted it to end, right?

…a… i,
a…, o… u…
(…Hiruko might also have been a victim of fate…)

(I hope, if she's reborn,
She can be happy in her next life…)
U… au… a…
(I thought I saw Hiruko smile slightly…)
Goodnight… Bye-bye.

(Along with the whale… 
The baby Hiruko also disappeared…)

Thank you, Mio… 
Thank you, Shinpei…
Hiroko…
Hey, Ryunosuke…

If we're reborn,
Will you be friends with me this time?

…Yeah!! Of course!!
I'll bring lots of sweets!!!
You too, big sister will definitely…

With Hizuru and Ryunosuke… 
It must be fun.

We'll talk about many things, go to many places,
And eat lots of food!
Yeah.
Looking forward to it…

(Ryunosuke too… 
Disappeared with Hiroko…)
Shinpei.
…Mio.
It seems we're saying goodbye here, Shinpei.
Maa… wait for me…

I'm going too!! 
With you!!

Hiruko is gone, the shadows will all disappear.
My right eye is also back to normal…

Even if I return to my body,
I'll die…

Like this…
I want to disappear with you…
You're silly…
If you say that, I'll get determined…

Shinpei has to go back!!
Everyone is waiting for you!

Don't worry.
I'll definitely send you back to 2018!!!

These three days,
I was really scared and super anxious…

…but I was happier than anything 
spending time with Shinpei!

Come on!!!
Shinpei…??

…I do too!!! 
Meeting you… I also…
I was happy, Mio…
